zh.lifeSummary: 當Gottfried I. von Sponheim於大約1125年出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲巴德 可茲納賀斯朋海姆時，他的父親Meginhard von Sponheim37歲，母親Mechtild Mörsberg von Saffenberg25歲。他和Mathilde de Lorraine至少有1個兒子。他去世於1183年在德國海藍-普法爾茲巴德 可茲納賀波斯朋海姆享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gottfried I. von Sponheim于大约1125年出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲巴德 可茲納賀斯朋海姆时，他的父亲Meginhard von Sponheim37岁，母亲Mechtild Mörsberg von Saffenberg25岁。他和Mathilde de Lorraine至少有1个儿子。他去世于1183年在德国海藍-普法爾茲巴德 可茲納賀波斯朋海姆享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Gottfried
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from god, got ‘god’ + frid ‘peace’; borne by the 13th-century poet Gottfried von Strassburg.

en.lifeSummary: When Gottfried I. von Sponheim was born about 1125, in Sponheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, his father, Meginhard von Sponheim, was 37 and his mother, Mechtild Mörsberg von Saffenberg, was 25. He had at least 1 son with Mathilde de Lorraine. He died in 1183, in Burgsponheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gottfried I. von Sponheim est né environ 1125, à Sponheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, son père, Meginhard von Sponheim, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Mechtild Mörsberg von Saffenberg, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mathilde de Lorraine. Il est décédé en 1183, à Burgsponheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gottfried I. von Sponheim um 1125 in Sponheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Meginhard von Sponheim 37 und seine Mutter Mechtild Mörsberg von Saffenberg 25. Er hatte mit Mathilde de Lorraine mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1183 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Burgsponheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gottfried I. von Sponheim è nato il circa 1125 nel Sponheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, il suo padre, Meginhard von Sponheim, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Mechtild Mörsberg von Saffenberg, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mathilde de Lorraine. Morì nel 1183, nel Burgsponheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gottfried I. von Sponheimが約1125年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズバド クレウズナチスプオンヘイムで生まれた時，父Meginhard von Sponheimは37歳，母Mechtild Mörsberg von Saffenbergは25歳であった。彼はMathilde de Lorraineとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1183年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズバド クレウズナチブルグスプオンヘイムで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gottfried I. von Sponheim(이)가 대략 1125년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 바드 크레우즈나치 스폰하임에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Meginhard von Sponheim(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Mechtild Mörsberg von Saffenberg(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Mathilde de Lorraine(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1183년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 바드 크레우즈나치 버그스폰하임에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gottfried I. von Sponheim nasceu aproximadamente 1125, em Sponheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, seu pai, Meginhard von Sponheim, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Mechtild Mörsberg von Saffenberg, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mathilde de Lorraine. Ele faleceu em 1183, em Burgsponheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gottfried I. von Sponheim родился около 1125 г. в местности споним, бад креузнач, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, его отцу по имени Meginhard von Sponheim было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Mechtild Mörsberg von Saffenberg, 25. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mathilde de Lorraine. Он умер в 1183 г. в местности бургспоним, бад креузнач, раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gottfried I. von Sponheim nació aproximadamente 1125, en Sponheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, su papá, Meginhard von Sponheim, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Mechtild Mörsberg von Saffenberg, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Mathilde de Lorraine. Murió en 1183, en Burgsponheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, a la edad de 59 años.
